homepage.title: Kirsty Blackman — Scottish National Party
homepage.meta_description: Kirsty was first elected to Aberdeen City Council in 2007 when she was 21. She served 8 years there and has been the SNP MP for Aberdeen North since May 2015.

homepage.text_excerpt: Kirsty Blackman — Scottish National Party recommended monthly logo annually youtube-play wheelchair-access whatsapp vimeo twitter tumblr transport-link toilets tick tea-coffee snp-map-pin snapchat slack share secure-lock search saltire-colour read printer play play-circle play-alt pinterest person parking C348D7CE-9D6A-413E-961F-5F5A93ABEDFA news-clock mysnp more-horiz messenger meal-provided map-pin mail location linkedin link instagram hearing-loop google google-multi free-wifi feed facebook facebook-blue expand-more drop-down parking direct-debit clottieyellow close cc-visa cc-paypal cc-mastercard calendar backtotop avatar avatar-circle avatar-black assistance-dogs-welcomed wheelchair-access accessible-lifts Skip to content Scottish National Party News Videos Events About Record Independence Contact Search Search Search News Videos Events About Record Independence Contact Follow Scottish National Party on Facebook Follow Scottish National Party on Instagram Follow Scottish National Party on Twitter Follow Scottish National Party on Youtube Follow Scottish National Party on Linkedin Share this page: 1 Facebook Share Twitter Share Whatsapp Share Facebook Messenger Share Print Share Email Share Linkedin Share Link Share Kirsty Blackman Aberdeen North Constituency Aberdeen North Constituency Office 46 John Street Aberdeen, AB25 1LL Telephone 01224 633285 Help Kirsty Kirsty was first elected to Aberdeen City Council in 2007 when she was 21. She served 8 years there and has been the SNP MP for Aberdeen North since May 2015. Kirsty is the Chief Whip of the SNP at Westminster and leads for her group on Women and Equalities and the DWP. Her priorities include the cost of living crisis, migration and the just transition. She has two children. Address: 70 Rosemount Place, Aberdeen, AB25 2XJ. When I say I want to help families with the cost of living, I mean it. by John Swinney Read More News Vote SNP for bold action on the cost of living and our NHS Posted on 16 April, 2026 Read John Swinney’s full speech at the SNP’s 2026 manifesto launch. Make it both votes SNP on Thursday 7th of May for a government that’s on your side. by John Swinney Read More News SNP 2026 Manifesto: Always on Scotland’s side Posted on 16 April, 2026 1 May, 2026 The SNP is always on your side. On May 7th choose a Scottish Government that works for Scotland. Make it both votes SNP. by the SNP Read More News Scotland fans must not be priced out of the World Cup Posted on 5 April, 2026 5 April, 2026 John Swinney has called on FIFA to end dynamic pricing for World Cup tickets after supporters were hit with eye-watering costs to follow Scotland this summer. by the SNP Read More News We are standing on the verge of a truly historic moment Posted on 26 March, 2026 28 April, 2026 Read First Minister John Swinney’s speech launching the SNP’s 2026 Election Campaign. by John Swinney Read More News First Minister John Swinney’s speech to the SNP’s 2026 Campaign Conference Posted on 14 March, 2026 14 March, 2026 Our message in this election is simple. Your First SNP vote elects an SNP Government. And your second SNP Vote delivers independence. by John Swinney Read More News A nation renewed, built by the wealth of our resources and our people. Posted on 25 February, 2026 25 February, 2026 That is the prize for Scotland and it is the fresh start offered by independence. by John Swinney Read More News What a vote for the SNP means Posted on 16 February, 2026 20 April, 2026 Only with the SNP can the people of Scotland guarantee that they always have a Scottish Government that’s always on Scotland’s side. by the SNP Follow us on social media Follow Scottish National Party on Facebook Follow Scottish National Party on Instagram Follow Scottish National Party on Twitter Follow Scottish National Party on Youtube Follow Scottish National Party on Linkedin Back to top Further information Take action News Policies Parliamentarians Donate Jobs Prize Draws Contact Contact Scottish National Party Gordon Lamb House 3 Jackson's Entry Edinburgh, Scotland EH8 8PJ tel: 0800 633 5432 email: info@snp.org Promoted by the Scottish National Party, Gordon Lamb House, 3 Jackson's Entry, Edinburgh, Scotland,

Expect a welcome drink, 4-course meal and, back by popular demand, 5-piece Glasgow band Echo State will allow you to dance the night away. Ticket information and booking will open soon. Reserve your space today.
